requestment_date.text: วันที่ยื่น

user_id.text: ผู้ทำรายการ

root.sql:
select sum(row_memno) over( Partition by tab.requestment_date order by tab.loan_type , tab.requestment_date ,tab.loan_requestment_no) as rowno ,tab.* from ( select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , (CASE lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,null,'1')over(order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date) WHEN sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ) AS requestment_date_tdate , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) AS membername , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.remark , sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first , sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share , sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit , sc_lon_m_loan_request.contract_code , sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthshare , sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthdep, sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthloan, sc_lon_m_loan_request.other_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status , TRUNC( pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_live(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date)/12 ) AS age_MEM_LOAN ,
coalesce( ( SELECT sum( sc_lon_m_req_loan_clear_ext.paid_amount ) FROM sc_lon_m_req_loan_clear_ext WHERE sc_lon_m_req_loan_clear_ext.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ), 0 ) as paid_amount_ext ,
coalesce( ( select sum( paid_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and type_pay_money = money_type_id and account_type = 'SET' and money_type_id = '180' ), 0 ) as ext_amount ,
( select coalesce(sc_lon_m_req_coll.req_amount , 0) from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '03' ) as req_amount_dep
,( select sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description from sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj where ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code ) ) as loan_objective_description ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_acc_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.type_pay_money, (select sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name from sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request.type_pay_money) as money_type_name
from sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , si_security_user
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type and si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id and sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0' /*WHERE*/ )tab

r_ktm_cpn_loan_req_detail_nest_coll.sql: select sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no , sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.evaluate_amount ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.req_amount ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code from sc_lon_m_req_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered left join sc_mem_m_member_work_info on sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = {0}

r_ktm_cpn_loan_req_detail_nest_old_loan.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_history.sequence_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_history.last_period, sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target, sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_history.interest_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_history.monthly_pay, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0} ) )

r_ktm_cpn_loan_req_detail_nest_fee.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type, sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_amount, sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_name, sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount FROM sc_lon_m_req_fee, sc_lon_m_ucf_fee WHERE ( sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = {0} ) )
